title: The Industrial Reconstruction Bank (Transfer of Undertakings and Repeal) Act, 1997
full_text: The Industrial Reconstruction Bank (Transfer of Undertakings and Repeal) Act, 1997 औद्योगिक पुनर्निर्माण बैंक (उपक्रमोंकाअंतरण और निरसन) अधिनियम, 1997 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199707 Act Number: 07 Enactment Date: 1997-03-19 Act Year: 1997 Short Title: The Industrial Reconstruction Bank (Transfer of Undertakings and Repeal) Act, 1997 Hindi Title: औद्योगिक पुनर्निर्माण बैंक (उपक्रमोंकाअंतरण और निरसन) अधिनियम, 1997 Long Title: An Act to provide for the transfer and vesting of the undertakings of the Industrial Reconstruction Bank of India to and in the Company to be formed and registered as a Company under the Companies Act, 1956, and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto and also to repeal the Industrial Reconstruction Bank of India Act, 1984. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Financial Services Enforcement Date: 24-01-1997 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Industrial Reconstruction Bank (Transfer of Undertakings and Repeal) Act, 1997 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II TRANSFER AND VESTING OF THE UNDERTAKING OF RECONSTRUCTION BANK IN COMPANY CHAPTER III MISCELLANEOUS CHAPTER IV AMENDMENT TO THE INDUSTRIAL RECONSTRATION BANK OF INDIA ACT, 1984 Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Undertakings of the Reconstruction Bank to vest in company. Section 4. General effect of vesting of undertaking in Company. Section 5. Provisions in respect of officers and other employees of Reconstruction Bank. Section 6. Concession, etc., to be deemed to have been granted to Company. Section 7. Tax exemption or benefit to continue to have effect. Section 8. Guarantee to be operative. Section 9. Arrangement with Company on appointment of directors to prevail. Section 10. Act 18 of 1891 to apply to the books of Company. Section 11. Shares, bonds and debentures to be deemed to be approved securities. Section 12. Substitution in Act, rules or regulations of company in place of the Reconstruction Bank. Section 13. Repeal and saving of Act 62 of 1984. Section 14. Repealed. Section 15. Repeal and Saving.
